name: Bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the meat.
2. Crush the bone.
3. Add the water and cloves to a large pot.
4. Heat slowly until it reaches boiling point.
5. Cover and simmer for 5 hours.
6. Season to taste.
7. Add the diced vegetables (celery, carrots, turnips, and onions).
8. Simmer for an additional hour.
9. Strain the broth through a fine mesh strainer into another pot or container.
10. Reduce the volume of the strained broth to 6 cups by simmering uncovered until desired consistency is reached.
11. Allow the broth to cool.
12. Remove any remaining fat from the surface.
13. Reheat the bouillon before serving.
6 servings.
